title: Jamaican Roasted Sausage Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy bowl filled with Jamaican roasted sausages, roasted vegetables, and served over a bed of quinoa.

ingredients.name: Roasted
ingredients.notes: Mixed roasted vegetables (bell peppers, onions, carrots)

instructions: Cook the quinoa according to package instructions.
Toss the mixed vegetables with 1 tbsp of olive oil and Jamaican jerk seasoning. Spread on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
Cook the Jamaican sausages in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned on both sides.
Serve the sausages over the cooked quinoa and roasted vegetables.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
